name: Lasagna Deliciousa
recipeIngredient: 1 cup (28 ounces) Tomatoes, Cut up, undrained
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare lasagna according to package directions; drain.
2. Cook sausage, ground beef, onion, and garlic in a large skillet over medium-high heat until the sausage is no longer pink and onion is tender.
3. Stir in tomatoes, tomato paste, sugar, 2 teaspoons of salt, basil, fennel seeds, and pepper. Bring to a boil over high heat.
4. Reduce heat to low. Simmer, uncovered, for about 20 minutes.
5. In a small bowl, blend ricotta, egg, parsley, and remaining 1/2 teaspoon of salt.
6. Spoon 1 1/2 cups of meat sauce into a 13x9 inch baking dish.
7. Layer 1/3 each of the lasagna, remaining meat sauce, ricotta mixture, olives, mozzarella, and Parmesan cheese in the dish.
8. Repeat layers.
9. Cover with foil. Bake at 375°F for 25 minutes.
10. Uncover. Bake about 20 more minutes, or until heated through. Let stand 10 minutes before cutting.
11. Makes about 8 to 10 servings.
